CustomField.description: Number of operators that will be considered at the time of creating prospects when an aircraft of this type is added to a campaign. This is the count of all operators who have Consider For Campaigns checked.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of operators that will be considered at the time of creating prospects when an aircraft of this type is added to a campaign. This is the count of all operators who have Consider For Campaigns checked.
CustomField.label: # Of Operators Considered For Campaigns
